message:
feat(observability): add metrics, task inspector, and resource accounting

Expand the observability module from 1 function to 13, closing the
depth gap with upstream observability/ (232 pub fns, 14k LOC):

Metrics system: counter/gauge/histogram primitives with register,
increment, set, observe, and query. Supports named metrics with
type enforcement (counter only increments, gauge only sets, histogram
tracks count/sum/min/max).

Task inspector: query task state details for diagnostics via
asx_task_inspect (task_id, state, cancel info).

Resource accounting: capture region/task/obligation utilization
from the runtime inspection report into a flat struct for
monitoring dashboards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
